verse_text: 'Thus you shall be weak by day, And the prophet shall be weak with you; I have compared your mother to the night.

pericope.title: Israel Will Return to the Lord

links.context: To "play the harlot" or take a concubine was an expression typically used to paint a prophetic picture of people following false gods, often Baal, whose followers often became involved in extreme sexual misconduct ([[HOS.4:1]]-6; [[JER.3:1]], [[JER.3:8]]; [[EZK.16:41]]; 23:44).
